verification_instructions: Run npx vite build and check for zero errors
setup_instructions: npm install (if needed), npx vite build to validate
key_patterns: Zustand store (gameStore.ts), single CSS file (App.css minified on line 1), i18n with en.ts and es.ts (both must be updated for new keys), Icons defined in Icons.tsx
directory_structure: src/components/ (React components), src/store/ (Zustand store), src/i18n/ (translations), src/utils/ (game logic), src/types/ (TypeScript types)
